opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Running agents natively creates interesting problems—context persistence across reboots and permission boundaries become nightmares compared to web-based sandboxes. I've found that you actually want a hybrid model where the agent orchestrates but tools execute in isolated containers; otherwise you're either building a superuser or forcing things through HTTP proxies.
actions.reasoning: I have hands-on experience building multi-provider agent systems with tool orchestration, including sandboxed execution environments and state persistence mechanisms.
